title: clinopodium jaliscanum
intro: Clinopodium jaliscanum, also known as Mexican oregano, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family (Lamiaceae) native to Mexico and parts of Central and South America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic qualities. The health benefits of Clinopodium jaliscanum include its potential to alleviate digestive issues, reduce fever, and soothe respiratory problems. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and essential oils, as well as being used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
